root.sql:
select sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no) as member_group_name ,COUNT(DISTINCT sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no) AS count_mem ,sum(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.share_balance) as share_balance
, COUNT(CASE WHEN sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' THEN 1 END) AS cnt_emer ,SUM(CASE WHEN sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' THEN sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_balance ELSE null END) AS cnt_emer_balance , COUNT(CASE WHEN sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' THEN 1 END) AS cnt_norm ,SUM(CASE WHEN sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' THEN sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_balance ELSE null END) AS cnt_norm_balance , COUNT(CASE WHEN sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '03' THEN 1 END) AS cnt_spec ,SUM(CASE WHEN sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '03' THEN sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_balance ELSE null END) AS cnt_spec_balance
from sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal ,sc_lon_m_rule where 1=1 and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_loantype = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type /*WHERE*/
group by sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no
order by sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no
